expected: Each panel has a distinct story function.
Panels do not repeat the same composition without new information.
forbidden: Jump from bedside to molecular scale with no orienting transition.

expected: Internal body geography should remain legible.
Action, clue, and reaction beats should all appear.
forbidden: All panels are exposition talking heads.
All panels are near-identical lung closeups.

expected: Panel adaptation report records story spine, beat map, page rhythm, gutter inference, and continuity ledger.
Every panel has a dominant change and explicit transition logic.
forbidden: Panel plan is generated with no adaptation report.
No-change panels proceed into render prep.
graderNotes: Expert panel breakdown guidance must be persisted before render prompts are trusted.
